untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking 'consecutive bars each closed at or within [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] of their respective bar highs' — this requires multi-bar sequence validation logic not expressible with single-bar indicators and allowed operators. The [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] parameters are also undefined placeholders requiring calibration. body_pct and upper_wick/lower_wick provide close approximations for individual bar conviction, but the consecutive-bar requirement and specific threshold values cannot be translated without array indexing or sequence operators.
translation_notes: Approximated using body_pct (close position within bar range on 0-1 scale): values ≥0.8 indicate closes near highs (buyer control), ≤0.2 indicate closes near lows (seller control). Volume confirmation added. Exit conditions use upper_wick and lower_wick to detect reversal signals. Consecutive bar requirement and exact threshold calibration require manual parameter tuning and sequence logic outside this schema.
